name: Grits and Grillades
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown 2 lb Beef round, thinly sliced in salad oil until browned; remove meat.
2. In a deep skillet, add flour and continue to brown, stirring constantly.
3. Add chopped onion and tomatoes; simmer for a few minutes.
4. Return the meat to the skillet, then add water, chopped green bell pepper, garlic, bay leaf, parsley, salt, Tabasco sauce, and thyme. Stir to combine.
5. Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce heat to low and let it simmer until the meat is very tender, about 1 1/2 hours. Add more water if needed to achieve the consistency of thick gravy.
6. Serve grillades with hot cooked rice and hominy grits on the side.
